input.content:
use crossterm::event::{KeyCode, KeyModifiers, MouseEventKind};

#[allow(dead_code)]
#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
pub enum AppEvent {
    Key { code: KeyCode, modifiers: KeyModifiers },
    Mouse { kind: MouseEventKind, col: u16, row: u16, modifiers: KeyModifiers },
    AgentChunk { tab_id: String, content: String },
    AgentComplete { tab_id: String, content: String, tokens: u32, cost: f64 },
    AgentError { tab_id: String, message: String },
    GitRefresh,
    Resize { cols: u16, rows: u16 },
    Tick,
}

content.text: Build succeeds with only warnings (no errors). The warnings are all expected dead code for a skeleton — fields that will be used by future tasks. Now commit:

input.command:
cd /Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui && git add rust/crates/app/src/ && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(app): AppState, event types, router, main loop skeleton

Implements Task 8: full AppState struct with layout/git/skills/tabs,
AppEvent enum, router with Ctrl+Q quit and all keyboard shortcuts,
agent_task stub, placeholder UI (rounded bordered box), and async
main loop using crossterm + ratatui. `cargo run` opens terminal and
exits cleanly on Ctrl+Q.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

content.text:
**DONE**

Build passes cleanly (0 errors, 16 warnings — all expected dead code for skeleton structs that future tasks will use).

Files created:
- `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/rust/crates/app/src/state.rs` — Full AppState, TabState, LayoutState, GitState, and all supporting types
- `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/rust/crates/app/src/event.rs` — AppEvent enum
- `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/rust/crates/app/src/agent_task.rs` — AgentCommand stub
- `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/rust/crates/app/src/router.rs` — Full keyboard routing (Ctrl+Q quit, tab management, sidebar toggles, panel switching, git refresh, agent events)
- `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/rust/crates/app/src/ui/mod.rs` — Placeholder renderer (rounded bordered box titled "clui")
- `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/rust/crates/app/src/main.rs` — Async main loop with crossterm raw mode, alternate screen, 60fps poll loop

Two fixes applied vs. the spec: (1) `mod event` conflicted with `crossterm::event` — resolved by importing `poll`/`read` directly; (2) borrow checker error in router's GitRefresh handler — fixed by cloning the branch string before the mutable borrow.
